About Me

Hi! I am a senior undergraduate student at the University of California, Santa Cruz, majoring in Economics and Mathematics. I am passionate about leveraging data-driven approaches to understand market dynamics, user behavior, and business performance.

My academic training has equipped me with strong analytical thinking, quantitative modeling skills, and a solid foundation in statistics and economic theory. I am particularly interested in Data Science, Market Analysis, and Product Analytics roles where I can translate complex datasets into actionable insights that support strategic decision-making.

Outside of academics, I enjoy photography and playing basketball 🏀. Photography helps me observe patterns and stories in everyday life, while basketball keeps me motivated through teamwork and resilience.
